subcodes.first_line: O ye of high resolve and noble aims! Your letter was eloquent, its contents original and sensitively expressed, and it betokened your great and praiseworthy efforts to educate the children… Devote ye particular attention to the school for girls
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صاحبان همت بلند و مقاصد ارجمند نامه شما فصیح بود و بلیغ و مضمون بدیع
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @role and station of women, @growth of the Cause, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
